title: Costco India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Costco India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Costco India in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costco India:
Costco India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India!
